title: teucrium × coeleste nothosubsp. coeleste
intro: Teucrium × coeleste nothosubsp. coeleste, also known as the Celestial Germander, is a hybrid plant species within the Teucrium genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of rosmarinic acid, a compound known for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Celestial Germander include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as high blood pressure and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Celestial Germander is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
